headline: Williams-Sonoma Balances Luxury Design And Sustainability As Valuation Lags Targets
summary: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) expanded its partnership with AERIN, launching a new collection inspired by Aerin Lauder’s East Hampton garden across tabletop, decor, and furniture. GreenRow, a Williams-Sonoma brand focused on sustainable home furnishings, opened its first flagship store in New York City’s SoHo neighborhood. For a home-focused retailer such as Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM), fresh design collaborations and new store concepts can be as important as product quality. The AERIN...

headline: Kohl's Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Comparable Sales Dip 2.8% Y/Y
summary: KSS posts fourth-quarter earnings beat at $1.07 as margins improve, but revenues fall 4.2% and comparable sales drop 2.8% amid fewer store transactions.

raw.headline: Kohl's Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Comparable Sales Dip 2.8% Y/Y

headline: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q4 Release
summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. announces release date for fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results: Wednesday, March 18th, 2026
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 11, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that it will release its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results on Wednesday, March 18th, 2026 before the market opens. Following the release via the wire services, the Company will host a conference call beginning at 10:00 AM Eastern Time, which can be accessed at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be available at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events be
